title: 30 Pack Clear Hot Glue Sticks 11 x 190 mm, Extra Long Strong Adhesive Glue Gun Sticks, Fast Drying, Ideal for DIY Crafts, Arts, Wood, Fabric, Repairs, and Home Projects
features: Extra Long & Strong Adhesive:These clear hot glue sticks measure 11 x 190 mm, providing extra length and strong bonding power for a wide range of materials, including wood, fabric, plastic, and more. Perfect for both heavy-duty repairs and delicate crafts.

Fast Drying & Durable Hold:Designed to dry quickly, these glue sticks ensure a secure and long-lasting bond in seconds. No more waiting around for your projects to set—ideal for time-sensitive tasks and quick fixes.

Versatile for Multiple Uses:Whether you're working on DIY crafts, home repairs, or creative arts, these glue sticks are your go-to solution. They work seamlessly with standard glue guns and are suitable for both beginners and professionals.

Clear & Neat Finish:The transparent adhesive leaves no visible residue, ensuring a clean and professional finish on all your projects. Perfect for applications where aesthetics matter, such as scrapbooking, jewelry making, or home decor.

Bulk Pack for Great Value:With 30 pieces in each pack, you'll always have enough glue sticks on hand for all your projects. This bulk offering saves you time and money, making it a must-have for craft enthusiasts and professionals alike.
